zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Til-Châtel於大約1215年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬時，他的父親Guy II De Til Chatel28歲，母親Guillemette de Coublanc27歲。他於大約1240年與Aluis de Vergy結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1275年1月22日享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Til-Châtel于大约1215年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬时，他的父亲Guy II De Til Chatel28岁，母亲Guillemette de Coublanc27岁。他于大约1240年与Aluis de Vergy结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1275年1月22日享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Til-Châtel was born about 1215, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Guy II De Til Chatel, was 28 and his mother, Guillemette de Coublanc, was 27. He married Aluis de Vergy about 1240. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 22 January 1275, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Til-Châtel est né environ 1215, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Guy II De Til Chatel, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Guillemette de Coublanc, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Aluis de Vergy environ 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 janvier 1275, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Til-Châtel um 1215 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy II De Til Chatel 28 und seine Mutter Guillemette de Coublanc 27. Er hat um 1240 Aluis de Vergy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Januar 1275 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Til-Châtel è nato il circa 1215 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Guy II De Til Chatel, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Guillemette de Coublanc, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Aluis de Vergy circa 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 22 gennaio 1275, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Til-Châtelが約1215年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Guy II De Til Chatelは28歳，母Guillemette de Coublancは27歳であった。約1240年にAluis de Vergyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1275年1月22日に61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Til-Châtel(이)가 대략 1215년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy II De Til Chatel(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Guillemette de Coublanc(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1240년 Aluis de Vergy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1275년 1월 22일 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Til-Châtel nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Guy II De Til Chatel, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Guillemette de Coublanc, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Aluis de Vergy aproximadamente 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de janeiro de 1275, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Til-Châtel родился около 1215 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy II De Til Chatel было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Guillemette de Coublanc, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Aluis de Vergy около 1240 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 22 января 1275 г. в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Til-Châtel nació aproximadamente 1215, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Guy II De Til Chatel, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Guillemette de Coublanc, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Aluis de Vergy aproximadamente 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 22 de enero de 1275, a la edad de 61 años.
